payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Close, partial view of a dark-painted rectangular mantel surround with recessed horizontal paneling above a deep black firebox opening; the interior shows a small exposed area of rough stone or soot at the bottom center, the lower firebox is cut off by the crop and the surround is edge-cropped (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"fireplace","short_description":"dark-painted mantel top, partial firebox","long_description":"Close, partial view of a dark-painted rectangular mantel surround with recessed horizontal paneling above a deep black firebox opening; the interior shows a small exposed area of rough stone or soot at the bottom center, the lower firebox is cut off by the crop and the surround is edge-cropped (approx. 0.6 m from camera).","attributes":["dark-painted mantel","recessed horizontal panels","black firebox void","visible stone/soot interior","edge-cropped/partial","close distance ~0.6 m"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
